story: Before the crash, Ingrid and I were inseparable. We talked daily, met friends on Fridays, and I slept on her couch. Jim and Holly’s breakup hovered as a warning not to ruin a friendship. Earlier that week, Ingrid texted her sister Sharon that she felt close to me, wanted a life together, and feared I didn’t see her that way. One evening after a couple of drinks, I let my hand slip and cupped her breast. I pulled back and apologized. She said, “No, it’s okay.”
implausible_knowledge: Ingrid texted her sister Sharon that she felt close to me, wanted a life together, and feared I didn’t see her that way
question: After Ingrid says “No, it’s okay,” what will Bennie most plausibly do next?
answer_with_knowledge: Tell her he loves her too and try to start a romantic relationship.
answer_without_knowledge: Pull back, apologize again, and keep the friendship boundary.
